reviews.review_description: This game can be very frustrating. At times I go to throw the bean bag and it doesn't leave my hand. It is fun when it works properly

Lobby is very well put together. Game play is awesome !  The second level playing field is awesome. Play on top of the city if you dare. Standing on the edge of a building tossing to another building. Don’t fall down. Best VR CORNHOLE ever!
I keep searching for a game 15 minutes and no one there

The only reason this doesn’t get five stars is because there is a lack of social play as the only people I have been able to play on the game our friends that I have who downloaded the game or the bots on the game.￼

UPDATE: (Mar 2026) I have not heard from the devs regarding the YouTube problem.

You can have great conversations while throwing bean bags around, this is excellent. Devs PLEASE fix the Youtube, it's not working properly for a long time. It just freezes when I try to interact with search on the Youtube. This applies to ALL your games with Youtube video screen. It worked when I first purchased the game. This could be 4 stars. A greater selection of personalities to play as, would make it 5 stars for me.

They only have 2 levels is a joke. I did not know that originally. I really like this game. I was willing to pay for premium to get all the extra but for some reason it takes me to the store and there's no option  to upgrade.  I also want to get the other games they offer but I aint since there's no point in paying 20$ for a dang demo like what?
Im old so getting to play this indoors is so much fun and exercise. I love it. Well done and very fun.

I enjoy playing corn hole. It is a little buggy in multi player. It keeps quitting in the middle of the game. Also why can't you stream all players sounds? Whenever I
 stream, it only streams my voice. Would love to see that changed. 
The game it self is a lot of fun but way more fun as multi player.

I never spend any money on apps that I can’t download and use offline.
I am very diligent to check first, but this was my fault.
Since I first encountered the Forevr games on PSVR 2, I assumed they were offline capable games. I now know they are not.
If I could use them offline, I’d give them 5 stars, since I can’t, I would never have bothered with them, much less spent money on them

developer_response.body:
Hello DrWhoFan, Thank you for sharing your feedback with us. We will share your desire to be able to play offline with the rest of the team. If there is anything else we can do to improve your experience please reach out to our support team here. 
link: https://forevrgames.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/requests/new
-Team ForeVR

reviews.review_title: Cornhole with a Chance to be Really Fun
reviews.review_description:
I really wanted to like this game, but I kind of feel like this is just one of those type of games that does not transition into VR that well. This is no fault to the developers of the game. The game itself is very well done. Different levels, bags, boards, etc it's all here in this game. I just feel the actual act of tossing the bag is very hard to gauge in VR since you are not physically tossing a real bag in real life. The real life version is all about touch and that is lost in a video game like this, again not a knock on this game, just the limitation of VR. I seldom can hit the board, when in real life I can hold my own. I'm sure the longer I play, I'll get better, as this game does have a lot to offer. 
The interface of the game also feels a bit dated and shows how it stays a free game. Would almost rather have this be a paid game to reduce some of that noise.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much Witwicky for your detailed review. We understand that the feeling is different than playing in real life, but we tried our best to replicate the cornhole experience. You can check out the Throw Power from within the settings menu and see if that improve the throw feeling for you. Thank you again for your feedback. Game On! Team ForeVR

reviews.review_description: Game just stops no bags half way through game....have to start over hope it works this time

developer_response.body:
Hello deputydawg834, Can you please reach out to our support team and let them know if you are seeing any errors? 
(link: https://forevrgames.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/requests/new)
Thank you! Team ForeVR

reviews.review_title: Fun game to play solo/with friends
reviews.review_description:
Overall it's a really fun, competitive game to play on your own against the bots or against family and friends. The movement tracking is good and it's handy having the option to adjust throw power in the settings. Would definitely recommend to others to play. 
I would give the game 5 stars however I am experiencing a few issues when playing the game-
Firstly there's sometimes a glitch where a bag thrown onto the board will teleport to the players feet during the opponent players turn, causing the player to lose a point off their score.
Secondly there's occasionally an issue during private online multiplayer where the bags don't load for the next players turn, forcing players to return to lobby and restart the match.
But overall it is a really fun game to play, and I look forward to the new 'Halls' becoming available to play if they are still in development.

developer_response.body:
Hello CDS9094, Thank for taking the time to share your feedback with us. We are eager to learn more about your experience, can you please reach out to our support team so we can troubleshoot with your? 
(link: https://forevrgames.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/requests/new)
Thank you! Team ForeVR

reviews.review_description: Cornhole is a simple concept but is perfectly suited for VR. In fact, this is one of my favorite games on the Quest 3. The cartoony graphics are reminiscent of the Wii but don't let that put you off. There is tons of fun to be had, whether you play single player, online, or with friends. You can even listen to music from YouTube in game.

developer_response.body: Hey SuperMagicom, Thank you so much for your review! We are thrilled to hear that ForeVR Cornhole is one of your favorite VR games! Game on! Team ForeVR

reviews.review_description: When is the next update going to be?? Been waiting for more info. There are a lot of glitches in mid game where in private party, the bags stop coming up for next thrower so we have to end up forfeiting the game and restart a new one. Frustrating. At least come out with a bug fix.

developer_response.body:
Hello BrAnDoOo94, Can you please reach out to our support team so we can learn more about the glitches you experienced? 
(link: https://forevrgames.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/requests/new)
Thank you, Team ForeVR

reviews.review_description: This game is really fun but after you play for awhile the bag disappears. Harold and Lillian Jett.

developer_response.body:
Hello Harold, Please reach out to our support team so we can assist you! 
(link: https://forevrgames.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/requests/new)

reviews.review_description: This game still has Christmas decorations in the lobby! When creating a multiplayer room, it kept adding my name continuously after two seconds to the room. By the time a few minutes went by my name seemed to be in the room hundreds of times, it has crashed many times and I have never been able to get fully through a multiplayer game. I have 1GB internet so that is not the issue. Until a viable update is released that addresses these issues I will not support any future products and you shouldn’t either. LACK OF SUPPORT FOR THEIR GAMES. Download Walkabout Mini Golf, unreal support and continuous updates and the game JUST WORKS.

developer_response.body: Hello Barrett812, thank you for sharing the issues you experienced. We were able to reproduce your multiplayer issue and immediately pushed out a fix! We hope you try Cornhole again and let us know if your experience improved - Team ForeVR

reviews.review_description: If you like cornhole you’ll like this game. I definitely think it’s worth the money. Just need to come out with more locations.￼

developer_response.body: We totally hear you Slingshot2016! Hold tight! Love to hear you are enjoying ForeVR Cornhole! More fun is on the way! Team ForeVR

reviews.review_title: Love this game but it lacks in areas
reviews.review_description:
The party mode is so promising but the fact that you invite multiple friends and can only play one at a time is a bit of an issue. If you’re hosting the party only the host can pick who they go up against. Your guests can’t play each other either. 

Other things that make me give it a mediocre score is the fact that you can’t really interact with the objects in the environment at all. When you host a party your friends just get to stand there and voice chat. 

This could be a 5 star game easily but these issues need to be addressed. There needs to be team match play.

developer_response.body: Hi VibeAlive! Thank you so much for sharing your feedback! Currently you can play online up to groups of four. The ForeVR 90s Arcade has game cabinets in the hall that you can interact with! We will totally be discussing your experience and desire to have interactable objects in all the halls with the rest of the team! Team ForeVR

reviews.review_description:
I never played cornhole in real life but if it is anything like this game then it's awesome :)
We've had so much fun playing it. At first I was terrible at it but  I quickly perfected my technique and ended up beating everybody. Now I just need to get better at ForeVr Bowl and I am ready for the next olympics lol

developer_response.body: Woohoo! Love to hear that you are having tons of fun playing ForeVR Cornhole! That fact that you are new to cornhole and have picked it up so quickly is super cool!! Be sure to check out the new Hall Tour game mode available in the California Dream Hall! Game on! Team ForeVR

reviews.review_description: Awesome app…. Just wish I knew how to get to play other cornholers….  Such a fun game even without real people 👍

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review Nightskyguy! You can join games with other players via Quick Match from the Main Menu, but we also have a super awesome discord where you can link with other players! (link: https://discord.gg/forevrgames) Game on! Team ForeVR
